pokemon:drampa.name: Drampa
pokemon:drampa.summary: This Pokémon is friendly to people and loves children most of all. It comes from deep in the mountains to play with children it likes in town.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon is friendly to people and loves children most of all. It comes from deep in the mountains to play with children it likes in town.
Drampa is a kind and friendly Pokémon—up until it’s angered. When that happens, it stirs up a gale and flattens everything around.
It has a compassionate personality, but if it is angered, it completely destroys its surroundings with its intense breath.
The mountains it calls home are nearly two miles in height. On rare occasions, it descends to play with the children living in the towns below.
It appears in towns and plays with the children. Drampa will protect kids when they’re in danger, so their moms don’t have to worry.
If a child it has made friends with is bullied, Drampa will find the bully’s house and burn it to the ground.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon is friendly to people and loves children most of all. It comes from deep in the mountains to play with children it likes in town.
